creator: swhetzel@gmail.com
text:
Attached is the fix to allow the security/vscan port run on FreeBSD/amd64.

I did find one problem with USE_LDCONFIG32, in that it doesn't set
LDCONFIG to /sbin/ldconfig -32.  I had to set it in the port,
otherwise the check for libm.so.2 would fail.

Scot

-- 
DISCLAIMER:
No electrons were mamed while sending this message. Only slightly bruised.
